name: Punkin Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy pan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and let cool completely before chilling in the refrigerator for 4 hours.
5. Serve on toast or English muffins.
Micha Buller Punkin Center, Arizona
(c) Phoenix Gazette, March 10, 1993.
